chapters.zh: 耶稣基督的启示，就是神赐给他，叫他将必要快成的事指示他的众仆人。他就差遣使者晓谕他的仆人约翰。
chapters.en: The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which must shortly come to pass; and he sent and signified by his angel unto his servant John:

chapters.zh: 约翰便将神的道和耶稣基督的见证，凡自己所看见的都证明出来。
chapters.en: Who bare record of the word of God, and of the testimony of Jesus Christ, and of all things that he saw.

chapters.zh: 念这书上预言的和那些听见又遵守其中所记载的，都是有福的，因为日期近了。
chapters.en: Blessed he that readeth, and they that hear the words of this prophecy, and keep those things which are written therein: for the time at hand.

chapters.zh: 约翰写信给亚西亚的七个教会。但愿从那昔在、今在、以后永在的神，和他宝座前的七灵，
chapters.en: John to the seven churches which are in Asia: Grace unto you, and peace, from him which is, and which was, and which is to come; and from the seven Spirits which are before his throne;

chapters.zh: 并那诚实作见证的、从死里首先复活、为世上君王元首的耶稣基督，有恩惠、平安归与你们！他爱我们，用自己的血使我们脱离（有古卷作：洗去）罪恶，
chapters.en: And from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness, the first begotten of the dead, and the prince of the kings of the earth. Unto him that loved us, and washed us from our sins in his own blood,

chapters.zh: 又使我们成为国民，作他父神的祭司。但愿荣耀、权能归给他，直到永永远远。阿们！
chapters.en: And hath made us kings and priests unto God and his Father; to him glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

chapters.zh: 看哪，他驾云降临！众目要看见他，连刺他的人也要看见他；地上的万族都要因他哀哭。这话是真实的。阿们！
chapters.en: Behold, he cometh with clouds; and every eye shall see him, and they which pierced him: and all kindreds of the earth shall wail because of him. Even so, Amen.

chapters.zh: 主神说：我是阿拉法，我是俄梅戛，（阿拉法，俄梅戛：是希利尼字母首末二字），是昔在、今在、以后永在的全能者。
chapters.en: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the ending, saith the Lord, which is, and which was, and which is to come, the Almighty.

chapters.zh: 我 ─ 约翰就是你们的弟兄，和你们在耶稣的患难、国度、忍耐里一同有分，为神的道，并为给耶稣作的见证，曾在那名叫拔摩的海岛上。
chapters.en: I John, who also am your brother, and companion in tribulation, and in the kingdom and patience of Jesus Christ, was in the isle that is called Patmos, for the word of God, and for the testimony of Jesus Christ.

chapters.zh: 当主日，我被圣灵感动，听见在我后面有大声音如吹号，说：
chapters.en: I was in the Spirit on the Lord's day, and heard behind me a great voice, as of a trumpet,

chapters.zh: 你所看见的当写在书上，达与以弗所、士每拿、别迦摩、推雅推喇、撒狄、非拉铁非、老底嘉、那七个教会。
chapters.en: Saying, I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last: and, What thou seest, write in a book, and send unto the seven churches which are in Asia; unto Ephesus, and unto Smyrna, and unto Pergamos, and unto Thyatira, and unto Sardis, and unto Philadelphia, and unto Laodicea.

chapters.zh: 我转过身来，要看是谁发声与我说话；既转过来，就看见七个金灯台。
chapters.en: And I turned to see the voice that spake with me. And being turned, I saw seven golden candlesticks;

chapters.zh: 灯台中间有一位好像人子，身穿长衣，直垂到脚，胸间束著金带。
chapters.en: And in the midst of the seven candlesticks like unto the Son of man, clothed with a garment down to the foot, and girt about the paps with a golden girdle.

chapters.zh: 他的头与发皆白，如白羊毛，如雪；眼目如同火燄；
chapters.en: His head and hairs white like wool, as white as snow; and his eyes as a flame of fire;

chapters.zh: 脚好像在炉中煆炼光明的铜；声音如同众水的声音。
chapters.en: And his feet like unto fine brass, as if they burned in a furnace; and his voice as the sound of many waters.

chapters.zh: 他右手拿著七星，从他口中出来一把两刃的利剑；面貌如同烈日放光。
chapters.en: And he had in his right hand seven stars: and out of his mouth went a sharp twoedged sword: and his countenance as the sun shineth in his strength.

chapters.zh: 我一看见，就仆倒在他脚前，像死了一样。他用右手按著我，说：不要惧怕！我是首先的，我是末后的，
chapters.en: And when I saw him, I fell at his feet as dead. And he laid his right hand upon me, saying unto me, Fear not; I am the first and the last:

chapters.zh: 又是那存活的；我曾死过，现在又活了，直活到永永远远；并且拿著死亡和阴间的钥匙。
chapters.en: I he that liveth, and was dead; and, behold, I am alive for evermore, Amen; and have the keys of hell and of death.

chapters.zh: 所以你要把所看见的，和现在的事，并将来必成的事，都写出来。
chapters.en: Write the things which thou hast seen, and the things which are, and the things which shall be hereafter;

chapters.zh: 论到你所看见、在我右手中的七星和七个金灯台的奥秘，那七星就是七个教会的使者，七灯台就是七个教会。
chapters.en: The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden candlesticks. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches: and the seven candlesticks which thou sawest are the seven churches.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给以弗所教会的使者，说：那右手拿著七星、在七个金灯台中间行走的，说：
chapters.en: Unto the angel of the church of Ephesus write; These things saith he that holdeth the seven stars in his right hand, who walketh in the midst of the seven golden candlesticks;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的行为、劳碌、忍耐，也知道你不能容忍恶人。你也曾试验那自称为使徒却不是使徒的，看出他们是假的来。
chapters.en: I know thy works, and thy labour, and thy patience, and how thou canst not bear them which are evil: and thou hast tried them which say they are apostles, and are not, and hast found them liars:

chapters.zh: 你也能忍耐，曾为我的名劳苦，并不乏倦。
chapters.en: And hast borne, and hast patience, and for my name's sake hast laboured, and hast not fainted.

chapters.zh: 然而有一件事我要责备你，就是你把起初的爱心离弃了。
chapters.en: Nevertheless I have against thee, because thou hast left thy first love.

chapters.zh: 所以，应当回想你是从那里坠落的，并要悔改，行起初所行的事。你若不悔改，我就临到你那里，把你的灯台从原处挪去。
chapters.en: Remember therefore from whence thou art fallen, and repent, and do the first works; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will remove thy candlestick out of his place, except thou repent.

chapters.zh: 然而你还有一件可取的事，就是你恨恶尼哥拉一党人的行为，这也是我所恨恶的。
chapters.en: But this thou hast, that thou hatest the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！得胜的，我必将神乐园中生命树的果子赐给他吃。
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of God.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给士每拿教会的使者，说：那首先的、末后的、死过又活的，说：
chapters.en: And unto the angel of the church in Smyrna write; These things saith the first and the last, which was dead, and is alive;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的患难，你的贫穷（你却是富足的），也知道那自称是犹太人所说的毁谤话，其实他们不是犹太人，乃是撒但一会的人。
chapters.en: I know thy works, and tribulation, and poverty, (but thou art rich) and the blasphemy of them which say they are Jews, and are not, but the synagogue of Satan.

chapters.zh: 你将要受的苦你不用怕。魔鬼要把你们中间几个人下在监里，叫你们被试炼，你们必受患难十日。你务要至死忠心，我就赐给你那生命的冠冕。
chapters.en: Fear none of those things which thou shalt suffer: behold, the devil shall cast of you into prison, that ye may be tried; and ye shall have tribulation ten days: be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！得胜的，必不受第二次死的害。
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; He that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给别迦摩教会的使者，说：那有两刃利剑的，说：
chapters.en: And to the angel of the church in Pergamos write; These things saith he which hath the sharp sword with two edges;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的居所，就是有撒但座位之处；当我忠心的见证人安提帕在你们中间、撒但所住的地方被杀之时，你还坚守我的名，没有弃绝我的道。
chapters.en: I know thy works, and where thou dwellest, where Satan's seat : and thou holdest fast my name, and hast not denied my faith, even in those days wherein Antipas my faithful martyr, who was slain among you, where Satan dwelleth.

chapters.zh: 然而，有几件事我要责备你：因为在你那里有人服从了巴兰的教训；这巴兰曾教导巴勒将绊脚石放在以色列人面前，叫他们吃祭偶像之物，行奸淫的事。
chapters.en: But I have a few things against thee, because thou hast there them that hold the doctrine of Balaam, who taught Balac to cast a stumblingblock before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed unto idols, and to commit fornication.

chapters.zh: 你那里也有人照样服从了尼哥拉一党人的教训。
chapters.en: So hast thou also them that hold the doctrine of the Nicolaitans, which thing I hate.

chapters.zh: 所以，你当悔改；若不悔改，我就快临到你那里，用我口中的剑攻击他们。
chapters.en: Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the sword of my mouth.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！得胜的，我必将那隐藏的吗哪赐给他，并赐他一块白石，石上写著新名；除了那领受的以外，没有人能认识。
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the hidden manna, and will give him a white stone, and in the stone a new name written, which no man knoweth saving he that receiveth .

chapters.zh: 你要写信给推雅推喇教会的使者，说：那眼目如火燄、脚像光明铜的神之子说：
chapters.en: And unto the angel of the church in Thyatira write; These things saith the Son of God, who hath his eyes like unto a flame of fire, and his feet like fine brass;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的行为、爱心、信心、勤劳、忍耐，又知道你末后所行的善事，比起初所行的更多。
chapters.en: I know thy works, and charity, and service, and faith, and thy patience, and thy works; and the last more than the first.

chapters.zh: 然而，有一件事我要责备你，就是你容让那自称是先知的妇人耶洗别教导我的仆人，引诱他们行奸淫，吃祭偶像之物。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding I have a few things against thee, because thou sufferest that woman Jezebel, which calleth herself a prophetess, to teach and to seduce my servants to commit fornication, and to eat things sacrificed unto idols.

chapters.zh: 我曾给他悔改的机会，他却不肯悔改他的淫行。
chapters.en: And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented not.

chapters.zh: 看哪，我要叫他病卧在床。那些与他行淫的人，若不悔改所行的，我也要叫他们同受大患难。
chapters.en: Behold, I will cast her into a bed, and them that commit adultery with her into great tribulation, except they repent of their deeds.

chapters.zh: 我又要杀死他的党类（原文是儿女），叫众教会知道，我是那察看人肺腑心肠的，并要照你们的行为报应你们各人。
chapters.en: And I will kill her children with death; and all the churches shall know that I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts: and I will give unto every one of you according to your works.

chapters.zh: 至于你们推雅推喇其余的人，就是一切不从那教训、不晓得他们素常所说撒但深奥之理的人，我告诉你们，我不将别的担子放在你们身上。
chapters.en: But unto you I say, and unto the rest in Thyatira, as many as have not this doctrine, and which have not known the depths of Satan, as they speak; I will put upon you none other burden.

chapters.zh: 但你们已经有的，总要持守，直等到我来。
chapters.en: But that which ye have hold fast till I come.

chapters.zh: 那得胜又遵守我命令到底的，我要赐给他权柄制伏列国；
chapters.en: And he that overcometh, and keepeth my works unto the end, to him will I give power over the nations:

chapters.zh: 他必用铁杖辖管（辖管：原文是牧）他们，将他们如同窑户的瓦器打得粉碎，像我从我父领受的权柄一样。
chapters.en: And he shall rule them with a rod of iron; as the vessels of a potter shall they be broken to shivers: even as I received of my Father.

chapters.zh: 我又要把晨星赐给他。
chapters.en: And I will give him the morning star.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给撒狄教会的使者，说：那有神的七灵和七星的，说：我知道你的行为，按名你是活的，其实是死的。
chapters.en: And unto the angel of the church in Sardis write; These things saith he that hath the seven Spirits of God, and the seven stars; I know thy works, that thou hast a name that thou livest, and art dead.

chapters.zh: 你要儆醒，坚固那剩下将要衰微（原文是死）的；因我见你的行为，在我神面前，没有一样是完全的。
chapters.en: Be watchful, and strengthen the things which remain, that are ready to die: for I have not found thy works perfect before God.

chapters.zh: 所以要回想你是怎样领受、怎样听见的、又要遵守，并要悔改。若不儆醒，我必临到你那里，如同贼一样。我几时临到，你也决不能知道。
chapters.en: Remember therefore how thou hast received and heard, and hold fast, and repent. If therefore thou shalt not watch, I will come on thee as a thief, and thou shalt not know what hour I will come upon thee.

chapters.zh: 然而在撒狄，你还有几名是未曾污秽自己衣服的，他们要穿白衣与我同行，因为他们是配得过的。
chapters.en: Thou hast a few names even in Sardis which have not defiled their garments; and they shall walk with me in white: for they are worthy.

chapters.zh: 凡得胜的必这样穿白衣，我也必不从生命册上涂抹他的名；且要在我父面前，和我父众使者面前，认他的名。
chapters.en: He that overcometh, the same shall be clothed in white raiment; and I will not blot out his name out of the book of life, but I will confess his name before my Father, and before his angels.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给非拉铁非教会的使者，说：那圣洁、真实、拿著大卫的钥匙、开了就没有人能关、关了就没有人能开的，说：
chapters.en: And to the angel of the church in Philadelphia write; These things saith he that is holy, he that is true, he that hath the key of David, he that openeth, and no man shutteth; and shutteth, and no man openeth;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的行为，你略有一点力量，也曾遵守我的道，没有弃绝我的名。看哪，我在你面前给你一个敞开的门，是无人能关的。
chapters.en: I know thy works: behold, I have set before thee an open door, and no man can shut it: for thou hast a little strength, and hast kept my word, and hast not denied my name.

chapters.zh: 那撒但一会的，自称是犹太人，其实不是犹太人，乃是说谎话的，我要使他们来，在你脚前下拜，也使他们知道我是已经爱你了。
chapters.en: Behold, I will make them of the synagogue of Satan, which say they are Jews, and are not, but do lie; behold, I will make them to come and worship before thy feet, and to know that I have loved thee.

chapters.zh: 你既遵守我忍耐的道，我必在普天下人受试炼的时候，保守你免去你的试炼。
chapters.en: Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 我必快来，你要持守你所有的，免得人夺去你的冠冕。
chapters.en: Behold, I come quickly: hold that fast which thou hast, that no man take thy crown.

chapters.zh: 得胜的，我要叫他在我神殿中作柱子，他也必不再从那里出去。我又要将我神的名和我神城的名（这城就是从天上、从我神那里降下来的新耶路撒冷），并我的新名，都写在他上面。
chapters.en: Him that overcometh will I make a pillar in the temple of my God, and he shall go no more out: and I will write upon him the name of my God, and the name of the city of my God, new Jerusalem, which cometh down out of heaven from my God: and my new name.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

chapters.zh: 你要写信给老底嘉教会的使者，说：那为阿们的，为诚信真实见证的，在神创造万物之上为元首的，说：
chapters.en: And unto the angel of the church of the Laodiceans write; These things saith the Amen, the faithful and true witness, the beginning of the creation of God;

chapters.zh: 我知道你的行为，你也不冷也不热；我巴不得你或冷或热。
chapters.en: I know thy works, that thou art neither cold nor hot: I would thou wert cold or hot.

chapters.zh: 你既如温水，也不冷也不热，所以我必从我口中把你吐出去。
chapters.en: So then because thou art lukewarm, and neither cold nor hot, I will spue thee out of my mouth.

chapters.zh: 你说：我是富足，已经发了财，一样都不缺；却不知道你是那困苦、可怜、贫穷、瞎眼、赤身的。
chapters.en: Because thou sayest, I am rich, and increased with goods, and have need of nothing; and knowest not that thou art wretched, and miserable, and poor, and blind, and naked:

chapters.zh: 我劝你向我买火炼的金子，叫你富足；又买白衣穿上，叫你赤身的羞耻不露出来；又买眼药擦你的眼睛，使你能看见。
chapters.en: I counsel thee to buy of me gold tried in the fire, that thou mayest be rich; and white raiment, that thou mayest be clothed, and the shame of thy nakedness do not appear; and anoint thine eyes with eyesalve, that thou mayest see.

chapters.zh: 凡我所疼爱的，我就责备管教他；所以你要发热心，也要悔改。
chapters.en: As many as I love, I rebuke and chasten: be zealous therefore, and repent.

chapters.zh: 看哪，我站在门外叩门，若有听见我声音就开门的，我要进到他那里去，我与他他与我一同坐席。
chapters.en: Behold, I stand at the door, and knock: if any man hear my voice, and open the door, I will come in to him, and will sup with him, and he with me.

chapters.zh: 得胜的，我要赐他在我宝座上与我同坐，就如我得了胜，在我父的宝座上与他同坐一般。
chapters.en: To him that overcometh will I grant to sit with me in my throne, even as I also overcame, and am set down with my Father in his throne.

chapters.zh: 圣灵向众教会所说的话，凡有耳的，就应当听！
chapters.en: He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

chapters.zh: 此后，我观看，见天上有门开了。我初次听见好像吹号的声音，对我说：你上到这里来，我要将以后必成的事指示你。
chapters.en: After this I looked, and, behold, a door opened in heaven: and the first voice which I heard as it were of a trumpet talking with me; which said, Come up hither, and I will shew thee things which must be hereafter.

chapters.zh: 我立刻被圣灵感动，见有一个宝座安置在天上，又有一位坐在宝座上。
chapters.en: And immediately I was in the spirit: and, behold, a throne was set in heaven, and sat on the throne.

chapters.zh: 看那坐著的，好像碧玉和红宝石；又有虹围著宝座，好像绿宝石。
chapters.en: And he that sat was to look upon like a jasper and a sardine stone: and a rainbow round about the throne, in sight like unto an emerald.

chapters.zh: 宝座的周围又有二十四个座位；其上坐著二十四位长老，身穿白衣，头上戴著金冠冕。
chapters.en: And round about the throne four and twenty seats: and upon the seats I saw four and twenty elders sitting, clothed in white raiment; and they had on their heads crowns of gold.

chapters.zh: 有闪电、声音、雷轰从宝座中发出；又有七盏火灯在宝座前点著；这七灯就是神的七灵。
chapters.en: And out of the throne proceeded lightnings and thunderings and voices: and seven lamps of fire burning before the throne, which are the seven Spirits of God.

chapters.zh: 宝座前好像一个玻璃海，如同水晶。宝座中和宝座周围有四个活物，前后遍体都满了眼睛。
chapters.en: And before the throne a sea of glass like unto crystal: and in the midst of the throne, and round about the throne, four beasts full of eyes before and behind.

chapters.zh: 第一个活物像狮子，第二个像牛犊，第三个脸面像人，第四个像飞鹰。
chapters.en: And the first beast like a lion, and the second beast like a calf, and the third beast had a face as a man, and the fourth beast like a flying eagle.

chapters.zh: 四活物各有六个翅膀，遍体内外都满了眼睛。他们昼夜不住的说：圣哉！圣哉！圣哉！主神是昔在、今在、以后永在的全能者。
chapters.en: And the four beasts had each of them six wings about ; and full of eyes within: and they rest not day and night, saying, Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.

chapters.zh: 每逢四活物将荣耀、尊贵、感谢归给那坐在宝座上、活到永永远远者的时候，
chapters.en: And when those beasts give glory and honour and thanks to him that sat on the throne, who liveth for ever and ever,

chapters.zh: 那二十四位长老就俯伏在坐宝座的面前敬拜那活到永永远远的，又把他们的冠冕放在宝座前，说：
chapters.en: The four and twenty elders fall down before him that sat on the throne, and worship him that liveth for ever and ever, and cast their crowns before the throne, saying,

chapters.zh: 我们的主，我们的神，你是配得荣耀、尊贵、权柄的；因为你创造了万物，并且万物是因你的旨意被创造而有的。
chapters.en: Thou art worthy, O Lord, to receive glory and honour and power: for thou hast created all things, and for thy pleasure they are and were created.

chapters.zh: 我看见坐宝座的右手中有书卷，里外都写著字，用七印封严了。
chapters.en: And I saw in the right hand of him that sat on the throne a book written within and on the backside, sealed with seven seals.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一位大力的天使大声宣传说：有谁配展开那书卷，揭开那七印呢？
chapters.en: And I saw a strong angel proclaiming with a loud voice, Who is worthy to open the book, and to loose the seals thereof?

chapters.zh: 在天上、地上、地底下，没有能展开、能观看那书卷的。
chapters.en: And no man in heaven, nor in earth, neither under the earth, was able to open the book, neither to look thereon.

chapters.zh: 因为没有配展开、配观看那书卷的，我就大哭。
chapters.en: And I wept much, because no man was found worthy to open and to read the book, neither to look thereon.

chapters.zh: 长老中有一位对我说：不要哭。看哪，犹大支派中的狮子，大卫的根，他已得胜，能以展开那书卷，揭开那七印。
chapters.en: And one of the elders saith unto me, Weep not: behold, the Lion of the tribe of Juda, the Root of David, hath prevailed to open the book, and to loose the seven seals thereof.

chapters.zh: 我又看见宝座与四活物，并长老之中有羔羊站立，像是被杀过的，有七角七眼，就是神的七灵，奉差遣往普天下去的。
chapters.en: And I beheld, and, lo, in the midst of the throne and of the four beasts, and in the midst of the elders, stood a Lamb as it had been slain, having seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of God sent forth into all the earth.

chapters.zh: 这羔羊前来，从坐宝座的右手里拿了书卷。
chapters.en: And he came and took the book out of the right hand of him that sat upon the throne.

chapters.zh: 他既拿了书卷，四活物和二十四位长老就俯伏在羔羊面前，各拿著琴和盛满了香的金炉；这香就是众圣徒的祈祷。
chapters.en: And when he had taken the book, the four beasts and four twenty elders fell down before the Lamb, having every one of them harps, and golden vials full of odours, which are the prayers of saints.

chapters.zh: 他们唱新歌，说：你配拿书卷，配揭开七印；因为你曾被杀，用自己的血从各族、各方、各民、各国中买了人来，叫他们归于神，
chapters.en: And they sung a new song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to God by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation;

chapters.zh: 又叫他们成为国民，作祭司归于神，在地上执掌王权。
chapters.en: And hast made us unto our God kings and priests: and we shall reign on the earth.

chapters.zh: 我又看见且听见，宝座与活物并长老的周围有许多天使的声音；他们的数目有千千万万，
chapters.en: And I beheld, and I heard the voice of many angels round about the throne and the beasts and the elders: and the number of them was ten thousand times ten thousand, and thousands of thousands;

chapters.zh: 大声说：曾被杀的羔羊是配得权柄、丰富、智慧、能力、尊贵、荣耀、颂赞的。
chapters.en: Saying with a loud voice, Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power, and riches, and wisdom, and strength, and honour, and glory, and blessing.

chapters.zh: 我又听见在天上、地上、地底下、沧海里，和天地间一切所有被造之物，都说：但愿颂赞、尊贵、荣耀、权势都归给坐宝座的和羔羊，直到永永远远！
chapters.en: And every creature which is in heaven, and on the earth, and under the earth, and such as are in the sea, and all that are in them, heard I saying, Blessing, and honour, and glory, and power, unto him that sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 四活物就说：阿们！众长老也俯伏敬拜。
chapters.en: And the four beasts said, Amen. And the four twenty elders fell down and worshipped him that liveth for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 我看见羔羊揭开七印中第一印的时候，就听见四活物中的一个活物，声音如雷，说：你来！
chapters.en: And I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals, and I heard, as it were the noise of thunder, one of the four beasts saying, Come and see.

chapters.zh: 我就观看，见有一匹白马；骑在马上的，拿著弓，并有冠冕赐给他。他便出来，胜了又要胜。
chapters.en: And I saw, and behold a white horse: and he that sat on him had a bow; and a crown was given unto him: and he went forth conquering, and to conquer.

chapters.zh: 揭开第二印的时候，我听见第二个活物说：你来。
chapters.en: And when he had opened the second seal, I heard the second beast say, Come and see.

chapters.zh: 就另有一匹马出来，是红的，有权柄给了那骑马的，可以从地上夺去太平，使人彼此相杀；又有一把大刀赐给他。
chapters.en: And there went out another horse red: and was given to him that sat thereon to take peace from the earth, and that they should kill one another: and there was given unto him a great sword.

chapters.zh: 揭开第三印的时候，我听见第三个活物说：你来！我就观看，见有一匹黑马；骑在马上的，手里拿著天平。
chapters.en: And when he had opened the third seal, I heard the third beast say, Come and see. And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand.

chapters.zh: 我听见在四活物中似乎有声音说：一钱银子买一升麦子，一钱银子买三升大麦；油和酒不可糟蹋。
chapters.en: And I heard a voice in the midst of the four beasts say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and thou hurt not the oil and the wine.

chapters.zh: 揭开第四印的时候，我听见第四个活物说：你来！
chapters.en: And when he had opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth beast say, Come and see.

chapters.zh: 我就观看，见有一匹灰色马；骑在马上的，名字叫作死，阴府也随著他；有权柄赐给他们，可以用刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫（或作：死亡）、野兽，杀害地上四分之一的人。
chapters.en: And I looked, and behold a pale horse: and his name that sat on him was Death, and Hell followed with him. And power was given unto them over the fourth part of the earth, to kill with sword, and with hunger, and with death, and with the beasts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 揭开第五印的时候，我看见在祭坛底下，有为神的道、并为作见证被杀之人的灵魂，
chapters.en: And when he had opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of them that were slain for the word of God, and for the testimony which they held:

chapters.zh: 大声喊著说：圣洁真实的主阿，你不审判住在地上的人，给我们伸流血的冤，要等到几时呢？
chapters.en: And they cried with a loud voice, saying, How long, O Lord, holy and true, dost thou not judge and avenge our blood on them that dwell on the earth?

chapters.zh: 于是有白衣赐给他们各人；又有话对他们说，还要安息片时，等著一同作仆人的和他们的弟兄也像他们被杀，满足了数目。
chapters.en: And white robes were given unto every one of them; and it was said unto them, that they should rest yet for a little season, until their fellowservants also and their brethren, that should be killed as they , should be fulfilled.

chapters.zh: 揭开第六印的时候，我又看见地大震动，日头变黑像毛布，满月变红像血，
chapters.en: And I beheld when he had opened the sixth seal, and, lo, there was a great earthquake; and the sun became black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became as blood;

chapters.zh: 天上的星辰坠落于地，如同无花果树被大风摇动，落下未熟的果子一样。
chapters.en: And the stars of heaven fell unto the earth, even as a fig tree casteth her untimely figs, when she is shaken of a mighty wind.

chapters.zh: 天就挪移，好像书卷被卷起来；山岭海岛都被挪移离开本位。
chapters.en: And the heaven departed as a scroll when it is rolled together; and every mountain and island were moved out of their places.

chapters.zh: 地上的君王、臣宰、将军、富户、壮士，和一切为奴的、自主的，都藏在山洞和岩石穴里，
chapters.en: And the kings of the earth, and the great men, and the rich men, and the chief captains, and the mighty men, and every bondman, and every free man, hid themselves in the dens and in the rocks of the mountains;

chapters.zh: 向山和岩石说：倒在我们身上罢！把我们藏起来，躲避坐宝座者的面目和羔羊的忿怒；
chapters.en: And said to the mountains and rocks, Fall on us, and hide us from the face of him that sitteth on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb:

chapters.zh: 因为他们忿怒的大日到了，谁能站得住呢？
chapters.en: For the great day of his wrath is come; and who shall be able to stand?

chapters.zh: 此后，我看见四位天使站在地的四角，执掌地上四方的风，叫风不吹在地上、海上，和树上。
chapters.en: And after these things I saw four angels standing on the four corners of the earth, holding the four winds of the earth, that the wind should not blow on the earth, nor on the sea, nor on any tree.

chapters.zh: 我又看见另有一位天使，从日出之地上来，拿著永生神的印。他就向那得著权柄能伤害地和海的四位天使大声喊著说：
chapters.en: And I saw another angel ascending from the east, having the seal of the living God: and he cried with a loud voice to the four angels, to whom it was given to hurt the earth and the sea,

chapters.zh: 地与海并树木，你们不可伤害，等我们印了我们神众仆人的额。
chapters.en: Saying, Hurt not the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, till we have sealed the servants of our God in their foreheads.

chapters.zh: 我听见以色列人各支派中受印的数目有十四万四千。
chapters.en: And I heard the number of them which were sealed: sealed an hundred forty four thousand of all the tribes of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 犹大支派中受印的有一万二千；流便支派中有一万二千；迦得支派中有一万二千；
chapters.en: Of the tribe of Juda sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Reuben sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Gad sealed twelve thousand.

chapters.zh: 亚设支派中有一万二千；拿弗他利支派中有一万二千；玛拿西支派中有一万二千；
chapters.en: Of the tribe of Aser sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Nepthalim sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Manasses sealed twelve thousand.

chapters.zh: 西缅支派中有一万二千；利未支派中有一万二千；以萨迦支派中有一万二千；
chapters.en: Of the tribe of Simeon sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Levi sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Issachar sealed twelve thousand.

chapters.zh: 西布伦支派中有一万二千；约瑟支派中有一万二千；便雅悯支派中受印的有一万二千。
chapters.en: Of the tribe of Zabulon sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Joseph sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Benjamin sealed twelve thousand.

chapters.zh: 此后，我观看，见有许多的人，没有人能数过来，是从各国、各族、各民、各方来的，站在宝座和羔羊面前，身穿白衣，手拿棕树枝，
chapters.en: After this I beheld, and, lo, a great multitude, which no man could number, of all nations, and kindreds, and people, and tongues, stood before the throne, and before the Lamb, clothed with white robes, and palms in their hands;

chapters.zh: 大声喊著说：愿救恩归与坐在宝座上我们的神，也归与羔羊！
chapters.en: And cried with a loud voice, saying, Salvation to our God which sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb.

chapters.zh: 众天使都站在宝座和众长老并四活物的周围，在宝座前，面伏于地，敬拜神，
chapters.en: And all the angels stood round about the throne, and the elders and the four beasts, and fell before the throne on their faces, and worshipped God,

chapters.zh: 说：阿们！颂赞、荣耀、智慧、感谢、尊贵、权柄、大力都归与我们的神，直到永永远远。阿们！
chapters.en: Saying, Amen: Blessing, and glory, and wisdom, and thanksgiving, and honour, and power, and might, unto our God for ever and ever. Amen.

chapters.zh: 长老中有一位问我说：这些穿白衣的是谁？是从那里来的？
chapters.en: And one of the elders answered, saying unto me, What are these which are arrayed in white robes? and whence came they?

chapters.zh: 我对他说：我主，你知道。他向我说：这些人是从大患难中出来的，曾用羔羊的血把衣裳洗白净了。
chapters.en: And I said unto him, Sir, thou knowest. And he said to me, These are they which came out of great tribulation, and have washed their robes, and made them white in the blood of the Lamb.

chapters.zh: 所以，他们在神宝座前，昼夜在他殿中事奉他。坐宝座的要用帐幕覆庇他们。
chapters.en: Therefore are they before the throne of God, and serve him day and night in his temple: and he that sitteth on the throne shall dwell among them.

chapters.zh: 他们不再饥，不再渴；日头和炎热也必不伤害他们。
chapters.en: They shall hunger no more, neither thirst any more; neither shall the sun light on them, nor any heat.

chapters.zh: 因为宝座中的羔羊必牧养他们，领他们到生命水的泉源；神也必擦去他们一切的眼泪。
chapters.en: For the Lamb which is in the midst of the throne shall feed them, and shall lead them unto living fountains of waters: and God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes.

chapters.zh: 羔羊揭开第七印的时候，天上寂静约有二刻。
chapters.en: And when he had opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven about the space of half an hour.

chapters.zh: 我看见那站在神面前的七位天使，有七枝号赐给他们。
chapters.en: And I saw the seven angels which stood before God; and to them were given seven trumpets.

chapters.zh: 另有一位天使，拿著金香炉来，站在祭坛旁边。有许多香赐给他，要和众圣徒的祈祷一同献在宝座前的金坛上。
chapters.en: And another angel came and stood at the altar, having a golden censer; and there was given unto him much incense, that he should offer with the prayers of all saints upon the golden altar which was before the throne.

chapters.zh: 那香的烟和众圣徒的祈祷从天使的手中一同升到神面前。
chapters.en: And the smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, ascended up before God out of the angel's hand.

chapters.zh: 天使拿著香炉，盛满了坛上的火，倒在地上；随有雷轰、大声、闪电、地震。
chapters.en: And the angel took the censer, and filled it with fire of the altar, and cast into the earth: and there were voices, and thunderings, and lightnings, and an earthquake.

chapters.zh: 拿著七枝号的七位天使就预备要吹。
chapters.en: And the seven angels which had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound.

chapters.zh: 第一位天使吹号，就有雹子与火搀著血丢在地上；地的三分之一和树的三分之一被烧了，一切的青草也被烧了。
chapters.en: The first angel sounded, and there followed hail and fire mingled with blood, and they were cast upon the earth: and the third part of trees was burnt up, and all green grass was burnt up.

chapters.zh: 第二位天使吹号，就有彷佛火烧著的大山扔在海中；海的三分之一变成血，
chapters.en: And the second angel sounded, and as it were a great mountain burning with fire was cast into the sea: and the third part of the sea became blood;

chapters.zh: 海中的活物死了三分之一，船只也坏了三分之一。
chapters.en: And the third part of the creatures which were in the sea, and had life, died; and the third part of the ships were destroyed.

chapters.zh: 第三位天使吹号，就有烧著的大星，好像火把从天上落下来，落在江河的三分之一和众水的泉源上。
chapters.en: And the third angel sounded, and there fell a great star from heaven, burning as it were a lamp, and it fell upon the third part of the rivers, and upon the fountains of waters;

chapters.zh: 这星名叫茵 𫈟。众水的三分之一变为茵 𫈟；因水变苦，就死了许多人。
chapters.en: And the name of the star is called Wormwood: and the third part of the waters became wormwood; and many men died of the waters, because they were made bitter.

chapters.zh: 第四位天使吹号，日头的三分之一，月亮的三分之一、星辰的三分之一都被击打，以致日月星的三分之一黑暗了，白昼的三分之一没有光，黑夜也是这样。
chapters.en: And the fourth angel sounded, and the third part of the sun was smitten, and the third part of the moon, and the third part of the stars; so as the third part of them was darkened, and the day shone not for a third part of it, and the night likewise.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一个鹰飞在空中，并听见他大声说：三位天使要吹那其余的号。你们住在地上的民，祸哉！祸哉！祸哉！
chapters.en: And I beheld, and heard an angel flying through the midst of heaven, saying with a loud voice, Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth by reason of the other voices of the trumpet of the three angels, which are yet to sound!

chapters.zh: 第五位天使吹号，我就看见一个星从天落到地上，有无底坑的钥匙赐给他。
chapters.en: And the fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star fall from heaven unto the earth: and to him was given the key of the bottomless pit.

chapters.zh: 他开了无底坑，便有烟从坑里往上冒，好像大火炉的烟；日头和天空都因这烟昏暗了。
chapters.en: And he opened the bottomless pit; and there arose a smoke out of the pit, as the smoke of a great furnace; and the sun and the air were darkened by reason of the smoke of the pit.

chapters.zh: 有蝗虫从烟中出来，飞到地上；有能力赐给他们，好像地上蝎子的能力一样，
chapters.en: And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power.

chapters.zh: 并且吩咐他们说，不可伤害地上的草和各样青物，并一切树木，惟独要伤害额上没有神印记的人。
chapters.en: And it was commanded them that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree; but only those men which have not the seal of God in their foreheads.

chapters.zh: 但不许蝗虫害死他们，只叫他们受痛苦五个月。这痛苦就像蝎子螫人的痛苦一样。
chapters.en: And to them it was given that they should not kill them, but that they should be tormented five months: and their torment as the torment of a scorpion, when he striketh a man.

chapters.zh: 在那些日子，人要求死，决不得死；愿意死，死却远避他们。
chapters.en: And in those days shall men seek death, and shall not find it; and shall desire to die, and death shall flee from them.

chapters.zh: 蝗虫的形状，好像预备出战的马一样，头上戴的好像金冠冕，脸面好像男人的脸面，
chapters.en: And the shapes of the locusts like unto horses prepared unto battle; and on their heads as it were crowns like gold, and their faces as the faces of men.

chapters.zh: 头发像女人的头发，牙齿像狮子的牙齿。
chapters.en: And they had hair as the hair of women, and their teeth were as of lions.

chapters.zh: 胸前有甲，好像铁甲。他们翅膀的声音，好像许多车马奔跑上阵的声音。
chapters.en: And they had breastplates, as it were breastplates of iron; and the sound of their wings as the sound of chariots of many horses running to battle.

chapters.zh: 有尾巴像蝎子，尾巴上的毒钩能伤人五个月。
chapters.en: And they had tails like unto scorpions, and there were stings in their tails: and their power to hurt men five months.

chapters.zh: 有无底坑的使者作他们的王，按著希伯来话，名叫亚巴顿，希利尼话，名叫亚玻伦。
chapters.en: And they had a king over them, the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in the Hebrew tongue Abaddon, but in the Greek tongue hath name Apollyon.

chapters.zh: 第一样灾祸过去了，还有两样灾祸要来。
chapters.en: One woe is past; , behold, there come two woes more hereafter.

chapters.zh: 第六位天使吹号，我就听见有声音从神面前金坛的四角出来，
chapters.en: And the sixth angel sounded, and I heard a voice from the four horns of the golden altar which is before God,

chapters.zh: 吩咐那吹号的第六位天使，说：把那捆绑在伯拉大河的四个使者释放了。
chapters.en: Saying to the sixth angel which had the trumpet, Loose the four angels which are bound in the great river Euphrates.

chapters.zh: 那四个使者就被释放；他们原是预备好了，到某年某月某日某时，要杀人的三分之一。
chapters.en: And the four angels were loosed, which were prepared for an hour, and a day, and a month, and a year, for to slay the third part of men.

chapters.zh: 马军有二万万；他们的数目我听见了。
chapters.en: And the number of the army of the horsemen two hundred thousand thousand: and I heard the number of them.

chapters.zh: 我在异象中看见那些马和骑马的，骑马的胸前有甲如火，与紫玛瑙并硫磺。马的头好像狮子头，有火、有烟、有硫磺从马的口中出来。
chapters.en: And thus I saw the horses in the vision, and them that sat on them, having breastplates of fire, and of jacinth, and brimstone: and the heads of the horses as the heads of lions; and out of their mouths issued fire and smoke and brimstone.

chapters.zh: 口中所出来的火与烟并硫磺，这三样灾杀了人的三分之一。
chapters.en: By these three was the third part of men killed, by the fire, and by the smoke, and by the brimstone, which issued out of their mouths.

chapters.zh: 这马的能力是在口里和尾巴上；因这尾巴像蛇，并且有头用以害人。
chapters.en: For their power is in their mouth, and in their tails: for their tails like unto serpents, and had heads, and with them they do hurt.

chapters.zh: 其余未曾被这些灾所杀的人仍旧不悔改自己手所做的，还是去拜鬼魔和那些不能看、不能听、不能走，金、银、铜、木、石的偶像，
chapters.en: And the rest of the men which were not killed by these plagues yet repented not of the works of their hands, that they should not worship devils, and idols of gold, and silver, and brass, and stone, and of wood: which neither can see, nor hear, nor walk:

chapters.zh: 又不悔改他们那些凶杀、邪术、奸淫、偷窃的事。
chapters.en: Neither repented they of their murders, nor of their sorceries, nor of their fornication, nor of their thefts.

chapters.zh: 我又看见另有一位大力的天使从天降下，披著云彩，头上有虹，脸面像日头，两脚像火柱。
chapters.en: And I saw another mighty angel come down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow upon his head, and his face as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire:

chapters.zh: 他手里拿著小书卷，是展开的。他右脚踏海，左脚踏地，
chapters.en: And he had in his hand a little book open: and he set his right foot upon the sea, and left on the earth,

chapters.zh: 大声呼喊，好像狮子吼叫。呼喊完了，就有七雷发声。
chapters.en: And cried with a loud voice, as a lion roareth: and when he had cried, seven thunders uttered their voices.

chapters.zh: 七雷发声之后，我正要写出来，就听见从天上有声音说：七雷所说的，你要封上，不可写出来。
chapters.en: And when the seven thunders had uttered their voices, I was about to write: and I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Seal up those things which the seven thunders uttered, and write them not.

chapters.zh: 我所看见的那踏海踏地的天使向天举起右手来，
chapters.en: And the angel which I saw stand upon the sea and upon the earth lifted up his hand to heaven,

chapters.zh: 指著那创造天和天上之物，地和地上之物，海和海中之物，直活到永永远远的，起誓说：不再有时日了（或作：不再耽延了）。
chapters.en: And sware by him that liveth for ever and ever, who created heaven, and the things that therein are, and the earth, and the things that therein are, and the sea, and the things which are therein, that there should be time no longer:

chapters.zh: 但在第七位天使吹号发声的时候，神的奥秘就成全了，正如神所传给他仆人众先知的佳音。
chapters.en: But in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he shall begin to sound, the mystery of God should be finished, as he hath declared to his servants the prophets.

chapters.zh: 我先前从天上所听见的那声音又吩咐我说：你去，把那踏海踏地之天使手中展开的小书卷取过来。
chapters.en: And the voice which I heard from heaven spake unto me again, and said, Go take the little book which is open in the hand of the angel which standeth upon the sea and upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 我就走到天使那里，对他说：请你把小书卷给我。他对我说：你拿著吃尽了，便叫你肚子发苦，然而在你口中要甜如蜜。
chapters.en: And I went unto the angel, and said unto him, Give me the little book. And he said unto me, Take , and eat it up; and it shall make thy belly bitter, but it shall be in thy mouth sweet as honey.

chapters.zh: 我从天使手中把小书卷接过来，吃尽了，在我口中果然甜如蜜，吃了以后，肚子觉得发苦了。
chapters.en: And I took the little book out of the angel's hand, and ate it up; and it was in my mouth sweet as honey: and as soon as I had eaten it, my belly was bitter.

chapters.zh: 天使（原文是他们）对我说：你必指著多民、多国、多方、多王再说预言。
chapters.en: And he said unto me, Thou must prophesy again before many peoples, and nations, and tongues, and kings.

chapters.zh: 有一根苇子赐给我，当作量度的杖，且有话说：起来！将神的殿和祭坛，并在殿中礼拜的人都量一量。
chapters.en: And there was given me a reed like unto a rod: and the angel stood, saying, Rise, and measure the temple of God, and the altar, and them that worship therein.

chapters.zh: 只是殿外的院子要留下不用量，因为这是给了外邦人的；他们要践踏圣城四十二个月。
chapters.en: But the court which is without the temple leave out, and measure it not; for it is given unto the Gentiles: and the holy city shall they tread under foot forty two months.

chapters.zh: 我要使我那两个见证人，穿著毛衣，传道一千二百六十天。
chapters.en: And I will give unto my two witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred threescore days, clothed in sackcloth.

chapters.zh: 他们就是那两棵橄榄树，两个灯台，立在世界之主面前的。
chapters.en: These are the two olive trees, and the two candlesticks standing before the God of the earth.

chapters.zh: 若有人想要害他们，就有火从他们口中出来，烧灭仇敌。凡想要害他们的都必这样被杀。
chapters.en: And if any man will hurt them, fire proceedeth out of their mouth, and devoureth their enemies: and if any man will hurt them, he must in this manner be killed.

chapters.zh: 这二人有权柄，在他们传道的日子叫天闭塞不下雨；又有权柄叫水变为血，并且能随时随意用各样的灾殃攻击世界。
chapters.en: These have power to shut heaven, that it rain not in the days of their prophecy: and have power over waters to turn them to blood, and to smite the earth with all plagues, as often as they will.

chapters.zh: 他们作完见证的时候，那从无底坑里上来的兽必与他们交战，并且得胜，把他们杀了。
chapters.en: And when they shall have finished their testimony, the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them, and shall overcome them, and kill them.

chapters.zh: 他们的尸首就倒在大城里的街上；这城按著灵意叫所多玛，又叫埃及，就是他们的主钉十字架之处。
chapters.en: And their dead bodies in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also our Lord was crucified.

chapters.zh: 从各民、各族、各方、各国中，有人观看他们的尸首三天半，又不许把尸首放在坟墓里。
chapters.en: And they of the people and kindreds and tongues and nations shall see their dead bodies three days and an half, and shall not suffer their dead bodies to be put in graves.

chapters.zh: 住在地上的人就为他们欢喜快乐，互相餽送礼物，因这两位先知曾叫住在地上的人受痛苦。
chapters.en: And they that dwell upon the earth shall rejoice over them, and make merry, and shall send gifts one to another; because these two prophets tormented them that dwelt on the earth.

chapters.zh: 过了这三天半，有生气从神那里进入他们里面，他们就站起来；看见他们的人甚是害怕。
chapters.en: And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from God entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them.

chapters.zh: 两位先知听见有大声音从天上来，对他们说：上到这里来。他们就驾著云上了天，他们的仇敌也看见了。
chapters.en: And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them.

chapters.zh: 正在那时候，地大震动，城就倒塌了十分之一，因地震而死的有七千人；其余的都恐惧，归荣耀给天上的神。
chapters.en: And the same hour was there a great earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to the God of heaven.

chapters.zh: 第二样灾祸过去，第三样灾祸快到了。
chapters.en: The second woe is past; , behold, the third woe cometh quickly.

chapters.zh: 第七位天使吹号，天上就有大声音说：世上的国成了我主和主基督的国；他要作王，直到永永远远。
chapters.en: And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this world are become of our Lord, and of his Christ; and he shall reign for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 在神面前，坐在自己位上的二十四位长老，就面伏于地，敬拜神，
chapters.en: And the four and twenty elders, which sat before God on their seats, fell upon their faces, and worshipped God,

chapters.zh: 说：昔在、今在的主神 ─ 全能者阿，我们感谢你！因你执掌大权作王了。
chapters.en: Saying, We give thee thanks, O Lord God Almighty, which art, and wast, and art to come; because thou hast taken to thee thy great power, and hast reigned.

chapters.zh: 外邦发怒，你的忿怒也临到了；审判死人的时候也到了。你的仆人众先知和众圣徒，凡敬畏你名的人，连大带小得赏赐的时候也到了。你败坏那些败坏世界之人的时候也就到了。
chapters.en: And the nations were angry, and thy wrath is come, and the time of the dead, that they should be judged, and that thou shouldest give reward unto thy servants the prophets, and to the saints, and them that fear thy name, small and great; and shouldest destroy them which destroy the earth.

chapters.zh: 当时，神天上的殿开了，在他殿中现出他的约柜。随后有闪电、声音、雷轰、地震、大雹。
chapters.en: And the temple of God was opened in heaven, and there was seen in his temple the ark of his testament: and there were lightnings, and voices, and thunderings, and an earthquake, and great hail.

chapters.zh: 天上现出大异象来：有一个妇人身披日头，脚踏月亮，头戴十二星的冠冕。
chapters.en: And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars:

chapters.zh: 他怀了孕，在生产的艰难中疼痛呼叫。
chapters.en: And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered.

chapters.zh: 天上又现出异象来：有一条大红龙，七头十角；七头上戴著七个冠冕。
chapters.en: And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads.

chapters.zh: 他的尾巴拖拉著天上星辰的三分之一，摔在地上。龙就站在那将要生产的妇人面前，等他生产之后，要吞吃他的孩子。
chapters.en: And his tail drew the third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born.

chapters.zh: 妇人生了一个男孩子，是将来要用铁杖辖管（辖管：原文是牧）万国的；他的孩子被提到神宝座那里去了。
chapters.en: And she brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto God, and his throne.

chapters.zh: 妇人就逃到旷野，在那里有神给他预备的地方，使他被养活一千二百六十天。
chapters.en: And the woman fled into the wilderness, where she hath a place prepared of God, that they should feed her there a thousand two hundred threescore days.

chapters.zh: 在天上就有了争战。米迦勒同他的使者与龙争战，龙也同他的使者去争战，
chapters.en: And there was war in heaven: Michael and his angels fought against the dragon; and the dragon fought and his angels,

chapters.zh: 并没有得胜，天上再没有他们的地方。
chapters.en: And prevailed not; neither was their place found any more in heaven.

chapters.zh: 大龙就是那古蛇，名叫魔鬼，又叫撒但，是迷惑普天下的。他被摔在地上，他的使者也一同被摔下去。
chapters.en: And the great dragon was cast out, that old serpent, called the Devil, and Satan, which deceiveth the whole world: he was cast out into the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.

chapters.zh: 我听见在天上有大声音说：我神的救恩、能力、国度、并他基督的权柄，现在都来到了！因为那在我们神面前昼夜控告我们弟兄的，已经被摔下去了。
chapters.en: And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and strength, and the kingdom of our God, and the power of his Christ: for the accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our God day and night.

chapters.zh: 弟兄胜过他，是因羔羊的血和自己所见证的道。他们虽至于死，也不爱惜性命。
chapters.en: And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the death.

chapters.zh: 所以，诸天和住在其中的，你们都快乐罢！只是地与海有祸了！因为魔鬼知道自己的时候不多，就气忿忿的下到你们那里去了。
chapters.en: Therefore rejoice, heavens, and ye that dwell in them. Woe to the inhabiters of the earth and of the sea! for the devil is come down unto you, having great wrath, because he knoweth that he hath but a short time.

chapters.zh: 龙见自己被摔在地上，就逼迫那生男孩子的妇人。
chapters.en: And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he persecuted the woman which brought forth the man .

chapters.zh: 于是有大鹰的两个翅膀赐给妇人，叫他能飞到旷野，到自己的地方，躲避那蛇；他在那里被养活一载二载半载。
chapters.en: And to the woman were given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness, into her place, where she is nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent.

chapters.zh: 蛇就在妇人身后，从口中吐出水来，像河一样，要将妇人冲去。
chapters.en: And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood.

chapters.zh: 地却帮助妇人，开口吞了从龙口吐出来的水（原文作河）。
chapters.en: And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth.

chapters.zh: 龙向妇人发怒，去与他其余的儿女争战，这儿女就是那守神诫命、为耶稣作见证的。那时龙就站在海边的沙上。
chapters.en: And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of God, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.
And I stood upon the sand of the sea.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一个兽从海中上来，有十角七头，在十角上戴著十个冠冕，七头上有亵渎的名号。
chapters.en: And saw a beast rise up out of the sea, having seven heads and ten horns, and upon his horns ten crowns, and upon his heads the name of blasphemy.

chapters.zh: 我所看见的兽，形状像豹，脚像熊的脚，口像狮子的口。那龙将自己的能力、座位、和大权柄都给了他。
chapters.en: And the beast which I saw was like unto a leopard, and his feet were as of a bear, and his mouth as the mouth of a lion: and the dragon gave him his power, and his seat, and great authority.

chapters.zh: 我看见兽的七头中，有一个似乎受了死伤，那死伤却医好了。全地的人都希奇跟从那兽，
chapters.en: And I saw one of his heads as it were wounded to death; and his deadly wound was healed: and all the world wondered after the beast.

chapters.zh: 又拜那龙 ─ 因为他将自己的权柄给了兽，也拜兽，说：谁能比这兽，谁能与他交战呢？
chapters.en: And they worshipped the dragon which gave power unto the beast: and they worshipped the beast, saying, Who like unto the beast? who is able to make war with him?

chapters.zh: 又赐给他说夸大亵渎话的口，又有权柄赐给他，可以任意而行四十二个月。
chapters.en: And there was given unto him a mouth speaking great things and blasphemies; and power was given unto him to continue forty two months.

chapters.zh: 兽就开口向神说亵渎的话，亵渎神的名并他的帐幕，以及那些住在天上的。
chapters.en: And he opened his mouth in blasphemy against God, to blaspheme his name, and his tabernacle, and them that dwell in heaven.

chapters.zh: 又任凭他与圣徒争战，并且得胜；也把权柄赐给他，制伏各族、各民、各方、各国。
chapters.en: And it was given unto him to make war with the saints, and to overcome them: and power was given him over all kindreds, and tongues, and nations.

chapters.zh: 凡住在地上、名字从创世以来没有记在被杀之羔羊生命册上的人，都要拜他。
chapters.en: And all that dwell upon the earth shall worship him, whose names are not written in the book of life of the Lamb slain from the foundation of the world.

chapters.zh: 凡有耳的，就应当听！
chapters.en: If any man have an ear, let him hear.

chapters.zh: 掳掠人的，必被掳掠；用刀杀人的，必被刀杀。圣徒的忍耐和信心就是在此。
chapters.en: He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity: he that killeth with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the patience and the faith of the saints.

chapters.zh: 我又看见另有一个兽从地中上来有两角如同羊羔，说话好像龙。
chapters.en: And I beheld another beast coming up out of the earth; and he had two horns like a lamb, and he spake as a dragon.

chapters.zh: 他在头一个兽面前，施行头一个兽所有的权柄，并且叫地和住在地上的人拜那死伤医好的头一个兽。
chapters.en: And he exerciseth all the power of the first beast before him, and causeth the earth and them which dwell therein to worship the first beast, whose deadly wound was healed.

chapters.zh: 又行大奇事，甚至在人面前，叫火从天降在地上。
chapters.en: And he doeth great wonders, so that he maketh fire come down from heaven on the earth in the sight of men,

chapters.zh: 他因赐给他权柄在兽面前能行奇事，就迷惑住在地上的人，说：要给那受刀伤还活著的兽作个像。
chapters.en: And deceiveth them that dwell on the earth by those miracles which he had power to do in the sight of the beast; saying to them that dwell on the earth, that they should make an image to the beast, which had the wound by a sword, and did live.

chapters.zh: 又有权柄赐给他，叫兽像有生气，并且能说话，又叫所有不拜兽像的人都被杀害。
chapters.en: And he had power to give life unto the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak, and cause that as many as would not worship the image of the beast should be killed.

chapters.zh: 他又叫众人，无论大小、贫富、自主的、为奴的，都在右手上或是在额上受一个印记。
chapters.en: And he causeth all, both small and great, rich and poor, free and bond, to receive a mark in their right hand, or in their foreheads:

chapters.zh: 除了那受印记、有了兽名或有兽名数目的，都不得做买卖。
chapters.en: And that no man might buy or sell, save he that had the mark, or the name of the beast, or the number of his name.

chapters.zh: 在这里有智慧：凡有聪明的，可以算计兽的数目；因为这是人的数目，他的数目是六百六十六。
chapters.en: Here is wisdom. Let him that hath understanding count the number of the beast: for it is the number of a man; and his number Six hundred threescore six.

chapters.zh: 我又观看，见羔羊站在锡安山，同他又有十四万四千人，都有他的名和他父的名写在额上。
chapters.en: And I looked, and, lo, a Lamb stood on the mount Sion, and with him an hundred forty four thousand, having his Father's name written in their foreheads.

chapters.zh: 我听见从天上有声音，像众水的声音和大雷的声音，并且我所听见的好像弹琴的所弹的琴声。
chapters.en: And I heard a voice from heaven, as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of a great thunder: and I heard the voice of harpers harping with their harps:

chapters.zh: 他们在宝座前，并在四活物和众长老前唱歌，彷佛是新歌；除了从地上买来的那十四万四千人以外，没有人能学这歌。
chapters.en: And they sung as it were a new song before the throne, and before the four beasts, and the elders: and no man could learn that song but the hundred forty four thousand, which were redeemed from the earth.

chapters.zh: 这些人未曾沾染妇女，他们原是童身。羔羊无论往那里去，他们都跟随他。他们是从人间买来的，作初熟的果子归与神和羔羊。
chapters.en: These are they which were not defiled with women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were redeemed from among men, the firstfruits unto God and to the Lamb.

chapters.zh: 在他们口中察不出谎言来；他们是没有瑕疵的。
chapters.en: And in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before the throne of God.

chapters.zh: 我又看见另有一位天使飞在空中，有永远的福音要传给住在地上的人，就是各国、各族、各方、各民。
chapters.en: And I saw another angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people,

chapters.zh: 他大声说：应当敬畏神，将荣耀归给他！因他施行审判的时候已经到了。应当敬拜那创造天地海和众水泉源的。
chapters.en: Saying with a loud voice, Fear God, and give glory to him; for the hour of his judgment is come: and worship him that made heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

chapters.zh: 又有第二位天使接著说：叫万民喝邪淫、大怒之酒的巴比伦大城倾倒了！倾倒了！
chapters.en: And there followed another angel, saying, Babylon is fallen, is fallen, that great city, because she made all nations drink of the wine of the wrath of her fornication.

chapters.zh: 又有第三位天使接著他们，大声说：若有人拜兽和兽像，在额上或在手上受了印记，
chapters.en: And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive mark in his forehead, or in his hand,

chapters.zh: 这人也必喝神大怒的酒；此酒斟在神忿怒的杯中纯一不杂。他要在圣天使和羔羊面前，在火与硫磺之中受痛苦。
chapters.en: The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb:

chapters.zh: 他受痛苦的烟往上冒，直到永永远远。那些拜兽和兽像，受他名之印记的，昼夜不得安宁。
chapters.en: And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name.

chapters.zh: 圣徒的忍耐就在此；他们是守神诫命和耶稣真道的。
chapters.en: Here is the patience of the saints: here they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus.

chapters.zh: 我听见从天上有声音说：你要写下：从今以后，在主里面而死的人有福了！圣灵说：是的，他们息了自己的劳苦，作工的果效也随著他们。
chapters.en: And I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Write, Blessed the dead which die in the Lord from henceforth: Yea, saith the Spirit, that they may rest from their labours; and their works do follow them.

chapters.zh: 我又观看，见有一片白云，云上坐著一位好像人子，头上戴著金冠冕，手里拿著快镰刀。
chapters.en: And I looked, and behold a white cloud, and upon the cloud sat like unto the Son of man, having on his head a golden crown, and in his hand a sharp sickle.

chapters.zh: 又有一位天使从殿中出来，向那坐在云上的大声喊著说：伸出你的镰刀来收割；因为收割的时候已经到了，地上的庄稼已经熟透了。
chapters.en: And another angel came out of the temple, crying with a loud voice to him that sat on the cloud, Thrust in thy sickle, and reap: for the time is come for thee to reap; for the harvest of the earth is ripe.

chapters.zh: 那坐在云上的，就把镰刀扔在地上，地上的庄稼就被收割了。
chapters.en: And he that sat on the cloud thrust in his sickle on the earth; and the earth was reaped.

chapters.zh: 又有一位天使从天上的殿中出来，他也拿著快镰刀。
chapters.en: And another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven, he also having a sharp sickle.

chapters.zh: 又有一位天使从祭坛中出来，是有权柄管火的，向拿著快镰刀的大声喊著说：伸出快镰刀来，收取地上葡萄树的果子，因为葡萄熟透了！
chapters.en: And another angel came out from the altar, which had power over fire; and cried with a loud cry to him that had the sharp sickle, saying, Thrust in thy sharp sickle, and gather the clusters of the vine of the earth; for her grapes are fully ripe.

chapters.zh: 那天使就把镰刀扔在地上，收取了地上的葡萄，丢在神忿怒的大酒醡中。
chapters.en: And the angel thrust in his sickle into the earth, and gathered the vine of the earth, and cast into the great winepress of the wrath of God.

chapters.zh: 那酒醡踹在城外，就有血从酒醡里流出来，高到马的嚼环，远有六百里。
chapters.en: And the winepress was trodden without the city, and blood came out of the winepress, even unto the horse bridles, by the space of a thousand six hundred furlongs.

chapters.zh: 我又看见在天上有异象，大而且奇，就是七位天使掌管末了的七灾，因为神的大怒在这七灾中发尽了。
chapters.en: And I saw another sign in heaven, great and marvellous, seven angels having the seven last plagues; for in them is filled up the wrath of God.

chapters.zh: 我看见彷佛有玻璃海，其中有火搀杂。又看见那些胜了兽和兽的像并他名字数目的人，都站在玻璃海上，拿著神的琴，
chapters.en: And I saw as it were a sea of glass mingled with fire: and them that had gotten the victory over the beast, and over his image, and over his mark, over the number of his name, stand on the sea of glass, having the harps of God.

chapters.zh: 唱神仆人摩西的歌，和羔羊的歌，说：主神 ─ 全能者阿，你的作为大哉！奇哉！万世（或作：国）之王阿，你的道途义哉！诚哉！
chapters.en: And they sing the song of Moses the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying, Great and marvellous thy works, Lord God Almighty; just and true thy ways, thou King of saints.

chapters.zh: 主阿，谁敢不敬畏你，不将荣耀归与你的名呢？因为独有你是圣的。万民都要来在你面前敬拜，因你公义的作为已经显出来了。
chapters.en: Who shall not fear thee, O Lord, and glorify thy name? for only holy: for all nations shall come and worship before thee; for thy judgments are made manifest.

chapters.zh: 此后，我看见在天上那存法柜的殿开了。
chapters.en: And after that I looked, and, behold, the temple of the tabernacle of the testimony in heaven was opened:

chapters.zh: 那掌管七灾的七位天使从殿中出来，穿著洁白光明的细麻衣（细麻衣；有古卷是宝石），胸间束著金带。
chapters.en: And the seven angels came out of the temple, having the seven plagues, clothed in pure and white linen, and having their breasts girded with golden girdles.

chapters.zh: 四活物中有一个把盛满了活到永永远远之神大怒的七个金碗给了那七位天使。
chapters.en: And one of the four beasts gave unto the seven angels seven golden vials full of the wrath of God, who liveth for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 因神的荣耀和能力，殿中充满了烟。于是没有人能以进殿，直等到那七位天使所降的七灾完毕了。
chapters.en: And the temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power; and no man was able to enter into the temple, till the seven plagues of the seven angels were fulfilled.

chapters.zh: 我听见有大声音从殿中出来，向那七位天使说：你们去，把盛神大怒的七碗倒在地上。
chapters.en: And I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways, and pour out the vials of the wrath of God upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 第一位天使便去，把碗倒在地上，就有恶而且毒的疮生在那些有兽印记、拜兽像的人身上。
chapters.en: And the first went, and poured out his vial upon the earth; and there fell a noisome and grievous sore upon the men which had the mark of the beast, and them which worshipped his image.

chapters.zh: 第二位天使把碗倒在海里，海就变成血，好像死人的血，海中的活物都死了。
chapters.en: And the second angel poured out his vial upon the sea; and it became as the blood of a dead : and every living soul died in the sea.

chapters.zh: 第三位天使把碗倒在江河与众水的泉源里，水就变成血了。
chapters.en: And the third angel poured out his vial upon the rivers and fountains of waters; and they became blood.

chapters.zh: 我听见掌管众水的天使说：昔在、今在的圣者阿，你这样判断是公义的；
chapters.en: And I heard the angel of the waters say, Thou art righteous, O Lord, which art, and wast, and shalt be, because thou hast judged thus.

chapters.zh: 他们曾流圣徒与先知的血，现在你给他们血喝；这是他们所该受的。
chapters.en: For they have shed the blood of saints and prophets, and thou hast given them blood to drink; for they are worthy.

chapters.zh: 我又听见祭坛中有声音说：是的，主神 ─ 全能者阿，你的判断义哉！诚哉！
chapters.en: And I heard another out of the altar say, Even so, Lord God Almighty, true and righteous thy judgments.

chapters.zh: 第四位天使把碗倒在日头上，叫日头能用火烤人。
chapters.en: And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and power was given unto him to scorch men with fire.

chapters.zh: 人被大热所烤，就亵渎那有权掌管这些灾的神之名，并不悔改将荣耀归给神。
chapters.en: And men were scorched with great heat, and blasphemed the name of God, which hath power over these plagues: and they repented not to give him glory.

chapters.zh: 第五位天使把碗倒在兽的座位上，兽的国就黑暗了。人因疼痛就咬自己的舌头；
chapters.en: And the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of darkness; and they gnawed their tongues for pain,

chapters.zh: 又因所受的疼痛，和生的疮，就亵渎天上的神，并不悔改所行的。
chapters.en: And blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores, and repented not of their deeds.

chapters.zh: 第六位天使把碗倒在伯拉大河上，河水就干了，要给那从日出之地所来的众王预备道路。
chapters.en: And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared.

chapters.zh: 我又看见三个污秽的灵，好像青蛙，从龙口、兽口并假先知的口中出来。
chapters.en: And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet.

chapters.zh: 他们本是鬼魔的灵，施行奇事，出去到普天下众王那里，叫他们在神全能者的大日聚集争战。
chapters.en: For they are the spirits of devils, working miracles, go forth unto the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the battle of that great day of God Almighty.

chapters.zh: （看哪，我来像贼一样。那儆醒、看守衣服、免得赤身而行、叫人见他羞耻的有福了！）
chapters.en: Behold, I come as a thief. Blessed he that watcheth, and keepeth his garments, lest he walk naked, and they see his shame.

chapters.zh: 那三个鬼魔便叫众王聚集在一处，希伯来话叫作哈米吉多顿。
chapters.en: And he gathered them together into a place called in the Hebrew tongue Armageddon.

chapters.zh: 第七位天使把碗倒在空中，就有大声音从殿中的宝座上出来，说：成了！
chapters.en: And the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air; and there came a great voice out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, It is done.

chapters.zh: 又有闪电、声音、雷轰、大地震，自从地上有人以来，没有这样大、这样利害的地震。
chapters.en: And there were voices, and thunders, and lightnings; and there was a great earthquake, such as was not since men were upon the earth, so mighty an earthquake, so great.

chapters.zh: 那大城裂为三段，列国的城也都倒塌了；神也想起巴比伦大城来，要把那盛自己烈怒的酒杯递给他。
chapters.en: And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great Babylon came in remembrance before God, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.

chapters.zh: 各海岛都逃避了，众山也不见了 .。
chapters.en: And every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.

chapters.zh: 又有大雹子从天落在人身上，每一个约重一他连得（一他连得约有九十斤）。为这雹子的灾极大，人就亵渎神。
chapters.en: And there fell upon men a great hail out of heaven, about the weight of a talent: and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof was exceeding great.

chapters.zh: 拿著七碗的七位天使中，有一位前来对我说：你到这里来，我将坐在众水上的大淫妇所要受的刑罚指给你看。
chapters.en: And there came one of the seven angels which had the seven vials, and talked with me, saying unto me, Come hither; I will shew unto thee the judgment of the great whore that sitteth upon many waters:

chapters.zh: 地上的君王与他行淫，住在地上的人喝醉了他淫乱的酒。
chapters.en: With whom the kings of the earth have committed fornication, and the inhabitants of the earth have been made drunk with the wine of her fornication.

chapters.zh: 我被圣灵感动，天使带我到旷野去，我就看见一个女人骑在朱红色的兽上；那兽有七头十角，遍体有亵渎的名号。
chapters.en: So he carried me away in the spirit into the wilderness: and I saw a woman sit upon a scarlet coloured beast, full of names of blasphemy, having seven heads and ten horns.

chapters.zh: 那女人穿著紫色和朱红色的衣服，用金子、宝石、珍珠为妆饰；手拿金杯，杯中盛满了可憎之物，就是他淫乱的污秽。
chapters.en: And the woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet colour, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having a golden cup in her hand full of abominations and filthiness of her fornication:

chapters.zh: 在他额上有名写著说：奥秘哉！大巴比伦，作世上的淫妇和一切可憎之物的母。
chapters.en: And upon her forehead a name written, MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH.

chapters.zh: 我又看见那女人喝醉了圣徒的血和为耶稣作见证之人的血。我看见他，就大大的希奇。
chapters.en: And I saw the woman drunken with the blood of the saints, and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus: and when I saw her, I wondered with great admiration.

chapters.zh: 天使对我说：你为甚么希奇呢？我要将这女人和驮著他的那七头十角兽的奥秘告诉你。
chapters.en: And the angel said unto me, Wherefore didst thou marvel? I will tell thee the mystery of the woman, and of the beast that carrieth her, which hath the seven heads and ten horns.

chapters.zh: 你所看见的兽，先前有，如今没有，将要从无底坑里上来，又要归于沉沦。凡住在地上、名字从创世以来没有记在生命册上的，见先前有、如今没有、以后再有的兽，就必希奇。
chapters.en: The beast that thou sawest was, and is not; and shall ascend out of the bottomless pit, and go into perdition: and they that dwell on the earth shall wonder, whose names were not written in the book of life from the foundation of the world, when they behold the beast that was, and is not, and yet is.

chapters.zh: 智慧的心在此可以思想。那七头就是女人所坐的七座山，
chapters.en: And here the mind which hath wisdom. The seven heads are seven mountains, on which the woman sitteth.

chapters.zh: 又是七位王；五位已经倾倒了，一位还在，一位还没有来到；他来的时候，必须暂时存留。
chapters.en: And there are seven kings: five are fallen, and one is, the other is not yet come; and when he cometh, he must continue a short space.

chapters.zh: 那先前有如今没有的兽，就是第八位；他也和那七位同列，并且归于沉沦。
chapters.en: And the beast that was, and is not, even he is the eighth, and is of the seven, and goeth into perdition.

chapters.zh: 你所看见的那十角就是十王；他们还没有得国，但他们一时之间要和兽同得权柄，与王一样。
chapters.en: And the ten horns which thou sawest are ten kings, which have received no kingdom as yet; but receive power as kings one hour with the beast.

chapters.zh: 他们同心合意将自己的能力、权柄给那兽。
chapters.en: These have one mind, and shall give their power and strength unto the beast.

chapters.zh: 他们与羔羊争战，羔羊必胜过他们，因为羔羊是万主之主、万王之王。同著羔羊的，就是蒙召、被选、有忠心的，也必得胜。
chapters.en: These shall make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords, and King of kings: and they that are with him called, and chosen, and faithful.

chapters.zh: 天使又对我说，你所看见那淫妇坐的众水，就是多民、多人、多国、多方。
chapters.en: And he saith unto me, The waters which thou sawest, where the whore sitteth, are peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues.

chapters.zh: 你所看见的那十角与兽必恨这淫妇，使他冷落赤身，又要吃他的肉，用火将他烧尽。
chapters.en: And the ten horns which thou sawest upon the beast, these shall hate the whore, and shall make her desolate and naked, and shall eat her flesh, and burn her with fire.

chapters.zh: 因为神使诸王同心合意，遵行他的旨意，把自己的国给那兽，直等到神的话都应验了。
chapters.en: For God hath put in their hearts to fulfil his will, and to agree, and give their kingdom unto the beast, until the words of God shall be fulfilled.

chapters.zh: 你所看见的那女人就是管辖地上众王的大城。
chapters.en: And the woman which thou sawest is that great city, which reigneth over the kings of the earth.

chapters.zh: 此后，我看见另有一位有大权柄的天使从天降下，地就因他的荣耀发光。
chapters.en: And after these things I saw another angel come down from heaven, having great power; and the earth was lightened with his glory.

chapters.zh: 他大声喊著说：巴比伦大城倾倒了！倾倒了！成了鬼魔的住处和各样污秽之灵的巢穴（或作：牢狱；下同），并各样污秽可憎之雀鸟的巢穴。
chapters.en: And he cried mightily with a strong voice, saying, Babylon the great is fallen, is fallen, and is become the habitation of devils, and the hold of every foul spirit, and a cage of every unclean and hateful bird.

chapters.zh: 因为列国都被他邪淫大怒的酒倾倒了。地上的君王与他行淫；地上的客商因他奢华太过就发了财。
chapters.en: For all nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her fornication, and the kings of the earth have committed fornication with her, and the merchants of the earth are waxed rich through the abundance of her delicacies.

chapters.zh: 我又听见从天上有声音说：我的民哪，你们要从那城出来，免得与他一同有罪，受他所受的灾殃；
chapters.en: And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, Come out of her, my people, that ye be not partakers of her sins, and that ye receive not of her plagues.

chapters.zh: 因他的罪恶滔天；他的不义神已经想起来了。
chapters.en: For her sins have reached unto heaven, and God hath remembered her iniquities.

chapters.zh: 他怎样待人，也要怎样待他，按他所行的加倍的报应他；用他调酒的杯加倍的调给他喝。
chapters.en: Reward her even as she rewarded you, and double unto her double according to her works: in the cup which she hath filled fill to her double.

chapters.zh: 他怎样荣耀自己，怎样奢华，也当叫他照样痛苦悲哀，因他心里说：我坐了皇后的位，并不是寡妇，决不至于悲哀。
chapters.en: How much she hath glorified herself, and lived deliciously, so much torment and sorrow give her: for she saith in her heart, I sit a queen, and am no widow, and shall see no sorrow.

chapters.zh: 所以在一天之内，他的灾殃要一齐来到，就是死亡、悲哀、饥荒。他又要被火烧尽了，因为审判他的主神大有能力。
chapters.en: Therefore shall her plagues come in one day, death, and mourning, and famine; and she shall be utterly burned with fire: for strong the Lord God who judgeth her.

chapters.zh: 地上的君王，素来与他行淫、一同奢华的，看见烧他的烟，就必为他哭泣哀号。
chapters.en: And the kings of the earth, who have committed fornication and lived deliciously with her, shall bewail her, and lament for her, when they shall see the smoke of her burning,

chapters.zh: 因怕他的痛苦，就远远的站著说：哀哉！哀哉！巴比伦大城，坚固的城阿，一时之间你的刑罚就来到了。
chapters.en: Standing afar off for the fear of her torment, saying, Alas, alas, that great city Babylon, that mighty city! for in one hour is thy judgment come.

chapters.zh: 地上的客商也都为他哭泣悲哀，因为没有人再买他们的货物了；
chapters.en: And the merchants of the earth shall weep and mourn over her; for no man buyeth their merchandise any more:

chapters.zh: 这货物就是金、银、宝石、珍珠、细麻布、紫色料、绸子、朱红色料、各样香木、各样象牙的器皿、各样极宝贵的木头，和铜、铁、汉白玉的器皿，
chapters.en: The merchandise of gold, and silver, and precious stones, and of pearls, and fine linen, and purple, and silk, and scarlet, and all thyine wood, and all manner vessels of ivory, and all manner vessels of most precious wood, and of brass, and iron, and marble,

chapters.zh: 并肉桂、荳蔻、香料、香膏、乳香、酒、油、细面、麦子、牛、羊、车、马，和奴仆、人口。
chapters.en: And cinnamon, and odours, and ointments, and frankincense, and wine, and oil, and fine flour, and wheat, and beasts, and sheep, and horses, and chariots, and slaves, and souls of men.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦哪，你所贪爱的果子离开了你；你一切的珍馐美味，和华美的物件也从你中间毁灭，决不能再见了。
chapters.en: And the fruits that thy soul lusted after are departed from thee, and all things which were dainty and goodly are departed from thee, and thou shalt find them no more at all.

chapters.zh: 贩卖这些货物、藉著他发了财的客商，因怕他的痛苦，就远远的站著哭泣悲哀，说：
chapters.en: The merchants of these things, which were made rich by her, shall stand afar off for the fear of her torment, weeping and wailing,

chapters.zh: 哀哉！哀哉！这大城阿，素常穿著细麻、紫色、朱红色的衣服，又用金子、宝石，和珍珠为妆饰。
chapters.en: And saying, Alas, alas, that great city, that was clothed in fine linen, and purple, and scarlet, and decked with gold, and precious stones, and pearls!

chapters.zh: 一时之间，这么大的富厚就归于无有了。凡船主和坐船往各处去的，并众水手，连所有靠海为业的，都远远的站著，
chapters.en: For in one hour so great riches is come to nought. And every shipmaster, and all the company in ships, and sailors, and as many as trade by sea, stood afar off,

chapters.zh: 看见烧他的烟，就喊著说：有何城能比这大城呢？
chapters.en: And cried when they saw the smoke of her burning, saying, What like unto this great city!

chapters.zh: 他们又把尘土撒在头上，哭泣悲哀，喊著说：哀哉！哀哉！这大城阿。凡有船在海中的，都因他的珍宝成了富足！他在一时之间就成了荒场！
chapters.en: And they cast dust on their heads, and cried, weeping and wailing, saying, Alas, alas, that great city, wherein were made rich all that had ships in the sea by reason of her costliness! for in one hour is she made desolate.

chapters.zh: 天哪，众圣徒、众使徒、众先知阿，你们都要因他欢喜，因为神已经在他身上伸了你们的冤。
chapters.en: Rejoice over her, heaven, and holy apostles and prophets; for God hath avenged you on her.

chapters.zh: 有一位大力的天使举起一块石头，好像大磨石，扔在海里，说：巴比伦大城也必这样猛力的被扔下去，决不能再见了。
chapters.en: And a mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone, and cast into the sea, saying, Thus with violence shall that great city Babylon be thrown down, and shall be found no more at all.

chapters.zh: 弹琴、作乐、吹笛、吹号的声音，在你中间决不能再听见；各行手艺人在你中间决不能再遇见；推磨的声音在你中间决不能再听见；
chapters.en: And the voice of harpers, and musicians, and of pipers, and trumpeters, shall be heard no more at all in thee; and no craftsman, of whatsoever craft , shall be found any more in thee; and the sound of a millstone shall be heard no more at all in thee;

chapters.zh: 灯光在你中间决不能再照耀；新郎和新妇的声音，在你中间决不能再听见。你的客商原来是地上的尊贵人；万国也被你的邪术迷惑了。
chapters.en: And the light of a candle shall shine no more at all in thee; and the voice of the bridegroom and of the bride shall be heard no more at all in thee: for thy merchants were the great men of the earth; for by thy sorceries were all nations deceived.

chapters.zh: 先知和圣徒，并地上一切被杀之人的血，都在这城里看见了。
chapters.en: And in her was found the blood of prophets, and of saints, and of all that were slain upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 此后，我听见好像群众在天上大声说：哈利路亚（就是要赞美耶和华的意思）！救恩、荣耀、权能都属乎我们的神！
chapters.en: And after these things I heard a great voice of much people in heaven, saying, Alleluia; Salvation, and glory, and honour, and power, unto the Lord our God:

chapters.zh: 他的判断是真实公义的；因他判断了那用淫行败坏世界的大淫妇，并且向淫妇讨流仆人血的罪，给他们伸冤。
chapters.en: For true and righteous his judgments: for he hath judged the great whore, which did corrupt the earth with her fornication, and hath avenged the blood of his servants at her hand.

chapters.zh: 又说：哈利路亚！烧淫妇的烟往上冒，直到永永远远。
chapters.en: And again they said, Alleluia. And her smoke rose up for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 那二十四位长老与四活物就俯伏敬拜坐宝座的神，说：阿们！哈利路亚！
chapters.en: And the four and twenty elders and the four beasts fell down and worshipped God that sat on the throne, saying, Amen; Alleluia.

chapters.zh: 有声音从宝座出来说：神的众仆人哪，凡敬畏他的，无论大小，都要赞美我们的神！
chapters.en: And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our God, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great.

chapters.zh: 我听见好像群众的声音，众水的声音，大雷的声音，说：哈利路亚！因为主 ─ 我们的神、全能者作王了。
chapters.en: And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for the Lord God omnipotent reigneth.

chapters.zh: 我们要欢喜快乐，将荣耀归给他。因为，羔羊婚娶的时候到了；新妇也自己预备好了，
chapters.en: Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the marriage of the Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready.

chapters.zh: 就蒙恩得穿光明洁白的细麻衣。这细麻衣就是圣徒所行的义。
chapters.en: And to her was granted that she should be arrayed in fine linen, clean and white: for the fine linen is the righteousness of saints.

chapters.zh: 天使吩咐我说：你要写上：凡被请赴羔羊之婚筵的有福了！又对我说：这是神真实的话。
chapters.en: And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of God.

chapters.zh: 我就俯伏在他脚前要拜他。他说：千万不可！我和你，并你那些为耶稣作见证的弟兄同是作仆人的，你要敬拜神。因为预言中的灵意乃是为耶稣作见证。
chapters.en: And I fell at his feet to worship him. And he said unto me, See not: I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren that have the testimony of Jesus: worship God: for the testimony of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy.

chapters.zh: 我观看，见天开了。有一匹白马，骑在马上的称为诚信真实，他审判，争战，都按著公义。
chapters.en: And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war.

chapters.zh: 他的眼睛如火燄，他头上戴著许多冠冕；又有写著的名字，除了他自己没有人知道。
chapters.en: His eyes as a flame of fire, and on his head many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself.

chapters.zh: 他穿著溅了血的衣服；他的名称为神之道。
chapters.en: And he clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Word of God.

chapters.zh: 在天上的众军骑著白马，穿著细麻衣，又白又洁，跟随他。
chapters.en: And the armies in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean.

chapters.zh: 有利剑从他口中出来，可以击杀列国。他必用铁杖辖管（辖管：原文是牧）他们，并要踹全能神烈怒的酒醡。
chapters.en: And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God.

chapters.zh: 在他衣服和大腿上有名写著说：万王之王，万主之主。
chapters.en: And he hath on vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一位天使站在日头中，向天空所飞的鸟大声喊著说：你们聚集来赴神的大筵席，
chapters.en: And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God;

chapters.zh: 可以吃君王与将军的肉，壮士与马和骑马者的肉，并一切自主的为奴的，以及大小人民的肉。
chapters.en: That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all free and bond, both small and great.

chapters.zh: 我看见那兽和地上的君王，并他们的众军都聚集，要与骑白马的并他的军兵争战。
chapters.en: And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army.

chapters.zh: 那兽被擒拿；那在兽面前曾行奇事、迷惑受兽印记和拜兽像之人的假先知，也与兽同被擒拿。他们两个就活活的被扔在烧著硫磺的火湖里；
chapters.en: And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone.

chapters.zh: 其余的被骑白马者口中出来的剑杀了；飞鸟都吃饱了他们的肉。
chapters.en: And the remnant were slain with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一位天使从天降下，手里拿著无底坑的钥匙和一条大炼子。
chapters.en: And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand.

chapters.zh: 他捉住那龙，就是古蛇，又叫魔鬼，也叫撒但，把他捆绑一千年，
chapters.en: And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Devil, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years,

chapters.zh: 扔在无底坑里，将无底坑关闭，用印封上，使他不得再迷惑列国。等到那一千年完了，以后必须暂时释放他。
chapters.en: And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season.

chapters.zh: 我又看见几个宝座，也有坐在上面的，并有审判的权柄赐给他们。我又看见那些因为给耶稣作见证，并为神之道被斩者的灵魂，和那没有拜过兽与兽像，也没有在额上和手上受过他印记之人的灵魂，他们都复活了，与基督一同作王一千年。
chapters.en: And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of God, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years.

chapters.zh: 这是头一次的复活。其余的死人还没有复活，直等那一千年完了。
chapters.en: But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This the first resurrection.

chapters.zh: 在头一次复活有分的有福了，圣洁了！第二次的死在他们身上没有权柄。他们必作神和基督的祭司，并要与基督一同作王一千年。
chapters.en: Blessed and holy he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.

chapters.zh: 那一千年完了，撒但必从监牢里被释放，
chapters.en: And when the thousand years are expired, Satan shall be loosed out of his prison,

chapters.zh: 出来要迷惑地上四方（原文是角）的列国，就是歌革和玛各，叫他们聚集争战。他们的人数多如海沙。
chapters.en: And shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle: the number of whom as the sand of the sea.

chapters.zh: 他们上来遍满了全地，围住圣徒的营与蒙爱的城，就有火从天降下，烧灭了他们。
chapters.en: And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from God out of heaven, and devoured them.

chapters.zh: 那迷惑他们的魔鬼被扔在硫磺的火湖里，就是兽和假先知所在的地方。他们必昼夜受痛苦，直到永永远远。
chapters.en: And the devil that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet , and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一个白色的大宝座与坐在上面的；从他面前天地都逃避，再无可见之处了。
chapters.en: And I saw a great white throne, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them.

chapters.zh: 我又看见死了的人，无论大小，都站在宝座前。案卷展开了，并且另有一卷展开，就是生命册。死了的人都凭著这些案卷所记载的，照他们所行的受审判。
chapters.en: And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before God; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works.

chapters.zh: 于是海交出其中的死人；死亡和阴间也交出其中的死人；他们都照各人所行的受审判。
chapters.en: And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and hell delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works.

chapters.zh: 死亡和阴间也被扔在火湖里；这火湖就是第二次的死。
chapters.en: And death and hell were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.

chapters.zh: 若有人名字没记在生命册上，他就被扔在火湖里。
chapters.en: And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.

chapters.zh: 我又看见一个新天新地；因为先前的天地已经过去了，海也不再有了。
chapters.en: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth: for the first heaven and the first earth were passed away; and there was no more sea.

chapters.zh: 我又看见圣城新耶路撒冷由神那里从天而降，预备好了，就如新妇妆饰整齐，等候丈夫。
chapters.en: And I John saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God out of heaven, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.

chapters.zh: 我听见有大声音从宝座出来说：看哪，神的帐幕在人间。他要与人同住，他们要作他的子民。神要亲自与他们同在，作他们的神。
chapters.en: And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God with men, and he will dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and God himself shall be with them, their God.

chapters.zh: 神要擦去他们一切的眼泪；不再有死亡，也不再有悲哀、哭号、疼痛，因为以前的事都过去了。
chapters.en: And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away.

chapters.zh: 坐宝座的说：看哪，我将一切都更新了！又说：你要写上；因这些话是可信的，是真实的。
chapters.en: And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he said unto me, Write: for these words are true and faithful.

chapters.zh: 他又对我说：都成了！我是阿拉法，我是俄梅戛；我是初，我是终。我要将生命泉的水白白赐给那口渴的人喝。
chapters.en: And he said unto me, It is done. I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.

chapters.zh: 得胜的，必承受这些为业：我要作他的神，他要作我的儿子。
chapters.en: He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.

chapters.zh: 惟有胆怯的、不信的、可憎的、杀人的、淫乱的、行邪术的、拜偶像的，和一切说谎话的，他们的分就在烧著硫磺的火湖里；这是第二次的死。
